/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/http_client_test.dir/__/__/tests/network/http_client_test.cpp.o -o http_client_test   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_1/lib libavsdk_network.a -lGTest::gtest_main ../infrastructure/libavsdk_infrastructure.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
